answer_en: Pillar 3a (3e pilier A) is a private, tax-advantaged pension scheme in Switzerland. For employed residents in Canton Vaud, annual contributions to an approved Pillar 3a account are fully deductible from your taxable income up to a specific annual ceiling [Vaud 2025 Instructions p.42].

citations.source_title: Instructions générales sur la déclaration d'impôt 2025 (Canton de Vaud)
